nasb.text: For when the priesthood is changed, of necessity there takes place a change of law also.

esv.text: For when there is a change in the priesthood, there is necessarily a change in the law as well.

cnv.text: 祭司的制度既然更改了，律法也必須更改。

ccb.text: 既然这祭司制度更改了，律法也必须更改。

csbs.text: 祭司职份被更换，律法也必须有所更换。
